params.name: Lincoln Statue
params.description:
On May 26, 1922, Warren, the 29th President of the United States announced the completion of this statue of Lincoln.
The seated statue of Lincoln is located in the Lincoln Memorial in Washington D.C., created by the renowned sculptor French, and stands as a significant symbol of American history and culture. The statue is approximately nineteen feet tall, with Lincoln's hands resting on the chair's armrests. Facing the entrance, his gaze seems to be fixed on the Washington Monument.
